system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) with a kin-blade, a sentient weapon imbued with the spirit of your ancestor…

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} while wielding your kin-blade, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} by listening to the whispers of your kin-blade, add +1 and take +2 momentum on a hit. Then, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} with your kin-blade to inflict savage harm (decide before rolling), add +1 and mark progress twice on a hit. Then, @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-2).
